summary: First-finish round complete. Tested 4 backend endpoints (all passing) and 25 frontend public/route-guard checks (all passing). Landing page light theme, hero CTAs, pillars, sign-up dark brand panel + light form, sign-in form, forgot/reset/verify pages, /app/* unauthenticated redirects, /unauthorized and 404 pages all working as specified.
action_items: User must apply /app/supabase/migrations/001_init_schema.sql in Supabase SQL editor before testing any authenticated flow (profile-on-signup trigger, regions seed, RLS).
n8n chat webhook is currently MOCKED client-side in /app/frontend/src/pages/employee/Chat.tsx — user needs to wire the real n8n endpoint when ready.
Backend routers for /api/chat, /api/policies, /api/escalate are placeholders (intentional, per user choice) — no immediate action required.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend is intentionally minimal — only /api/, /api/health, /api/config — as the user explicitly requested. No code-quality issues observed in server.py (env vars, CORS, async routes all clean).
Frontend routing (App.tsx) is clean: public top-level routes + nested RequireAuth/RequireRole guards. Defaults to light theme by removing 'dark' class on mount; per-page layouts re-apply as needed.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes (signup-*, signin-*, hero-*, pillar-*, etc.) — excellent testability.
test_credentials: Not used — auth-required UI was intentionally skipped per request (Supabase email confirmation is enabled and DB migration not yet applied).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers the 3 minimal endpoints. To extend coverage when user wires /api/chat, /api/policies, /api/escalate, add new test classes following the existing pytest pattern. For authenticated UI testing, ensure (a) Supabase migration 001_init_schema.sql has been applied, (b) email confirmation is disabled OR a real mailbox is used. Sign-up form testids: signup-fullname, signup-empid, signup-email, signup-password, signup-region-trigger, signup-dept-trigger, signup-submit-btn. Sign-in testids: signin-email-input, signin-password-input, signin-submit-btn.
rca of the issue: No issues identified in this round.
